   132:	if (shelfCompare !== 0) return shelfCompare;
   133:
   134:	const zoneCompare = String(a?.zoneName || "").localeCompare(
   135:
   136:		String(b?.zoneName || ""),
   137:		undefined,
   138:		{ numeric: true, sensitivity: "base" },
   139:	);
   140:	if (zoneCompare !== 0) return zoneCompare;
   141:
   142:	const upcCompare = String(a?.upc || a?.sku || "").localeCompare(
   143:		String(b?.upc || b?.sku || ""),
   144:		undefined,
   145:		{ numeric: true, sensitivity: "base" },
   146:	);
   147:	if (upcCompare !== 0) return upcCompare;
   148:
   149:	return String(a?.orderNo || "").localeCompare(String(b?.orderNo || ""), undefined, {
   150:		numeric: true,
   151:		sensitivity: "base",
   152:	});
   153:}
   154:
   155:function buildPickListSections(labelDesc) {
   156:	const sections = [];
   157:
   158:	for (const zone of Array.isArray(labelDesc) ? labelDesc : []) {
   159:		const zoneName = zone?.zoneName || "UNKNOWN";
   160:		const items = (Array.isArray(zone?.items) ? zone.items : []).map((item) => ({
   161:			...item,
   162:			zoneName: item?.zoneName || zoneName,
   163:			shelfName: item?.shelfName || "UNKNOWN",
   164:			upc: item?.upc || item?.sku || "",
   165:			num: Number(item?.num) || 0,
   166:		}));
   167:
   168:		items.sort(comparePickListItems);
   169:		sections.push({
   170:			zoneName,
   171:			items,
   172:		});
   173:	}
   174:
   175:	return sections;
   176:}
   177:
   178:
   179:function drawPickListPageHeader(doc, batchItem, layout, showTitle = false) {
   180:	const titleY = layout.margin + 2;
   181:	const infoY = showTitle ? titleY + 28 : titleY;
   182:
   183:	if (showTitle) {
   184:		doc.font("Helvetica-Bold").fontSize(16).text(
   185:			"Picking Details",
   186:			layout.margin,
   187:			titleY,
   188:			{
   189:				width: layout.pageWidth - layout.margin * 2,
   190:				align: "center",
   191:			},
   192:		);
   193:	}
   194:
   195:	doc.font("Helvetica").fontSize(11).text(
   196:		`Pick No: ${batchItem.pickNo}`,
   197:		layout.startX,
   198:		infoY,
   199:		{
   200:			width: 145,
   201:		},
   202:	);
   203:	doc.text(
   204:		`Total Pick Items: ${layout.totalPickItems}`,
   205:		layout.startX + 145,
   206:		infoY,
   207:		{
   208:			width: layout.contentWidth - 145,
   209:			align: "right",
   210:		},
   211:	);
   212:
   213:	return infoY + 20;
   214:}
   215:
   216:function measureTableRowHeight(doc, row, colWidths, options) {
   217:	const {
   218:		fontSize,
   219:		paddingX,
   220:		paddingY,
   221:		baseRowHeight,
   222:		lineGap,
   223:	} = options;
   224:	let maxTextHeight = 0;
   225:
   226:	doc.fontSize(fontSize);
   227:	for (let i = 0; i < colWidths.length; i++) {
   228:		const text = String(row[i] || "");
   229:		const textHeight = doc.heightOfString(text, {
   230:			width: Math.max(colWidths[i] - paddingX * 2, 10),
   231:			align: "center",
   232:			lineGap,
   233:		});
   234:		maxTextHeight = Math.max(maxTextHeight, textHeight);
   235:	}
   236:
   237:	return Math.max(baseRowHeight, Math.ceil(maxTextHeight + paddingY * 2));
   238:}
   239:
   240:function drawTableRow(doc, startX, startY, row, colWidths, rowHeight, options) {
   241:	const {
   242:		fontName,
   243:		fontSize,
   244:		paddingX,
   245:		paddingY,
   246:		lineGap,
   247:	} = options;
   248:	let currentX = startX;
   249:
   250:	doc.font(fontName).fontSize(fontSize);
   251:	for (let i = 0; i < colWidths.length; i++) {
   252:		const cellWidth = colWidths[i];
   253:		const text = String(row[i] || "");
   254:
   255:		doc.rect(currentX, startY, cellWidth, rowHeight).stroke();
   256:		doc.text(text, currentX + paddingX, startY + paddingY, {
   257:			width: Math.max(cellWidth - paddingX * 2, 10),
   258:			align: "center",
   259:			lineGap,
   260:		});
   261:		currentX += cellWidth;
   262:	}
   263:
   264:	return startY + rowHeight;
   265:}
   266:
   267:function generatePickList(batchItem, folderPath) {
   268:	const doc = new PDFDocument({
   269:		margin: 10,
   270:		size: [320, 500],
   271:	});
   272:	const outputPath = path.join(folderPath, "pick-list.pdf");
   273:	doc.pipe(fs.createWriteStream(outputPath));
   274:
   275:	const pageWidth = 320;
   276:	const pageHeight = 500;
   277:	const margin = 10;
   278:	const contentWidth = 294;
   279:	const startX = (pageWidth - contentWidth) / 2;
   280:	const maxContentY = pageHeight - margin;
   281:	const colWidths = [112, 118, 64];
   282:	const headers = ["UPC", "Location", "Qty"];
   283:	const tableOptions = {
   284:		baseRowHeight: 22,
   285:		headerFontSize: 10,
   286:		bodyFontSize: 9,
   287:		paddingX: 6,
   288:		paddingY: 6,
   289:		lineGap: 1,
   290:		maxContentY,
   291:	};
   292:	const sections = buildPickListSections(batchItem.labelDesc);
   293:	const totalPickItems = sections.reduce(
   294:		(sum, section) => sum + section.items.length,
   295:		0,
   296:	);
   297:	const layout = {
   298:		pageWidth,
   299:		contentWidth,
   300:		margin,
   301:		startX,
   302:		totalPickItems,
   303:	};
   304:	const drawPageHeader = (showTitle = false) =>
   305:		drawPickListPageHeader(doc, batchItem, layout, showTitle);
   306:	const headerRowHeight = measureTableRowHeight(doc, headers, colWidths, {
   307:		fontSize: tableOptions.headerFontSize,
   308:		paddingX: tableOptions.paddingX,
   309:		paddingY: tableOptions.paddingY,
   310:		baseRowHeight: tableOptions.baseRowHeight,
   311:		lineGap: tableOptions.lineGap,
   312:	});
   313:
   314:	let tableStartY = drawPageHeader(true) + 8;
   315:
   316:	sections.forEach((section) => {
   317:		const rows = section.items.map((item) => [
   318:			item.upc,
   319:			item.shelfName,
   320:			String(item.num),
   321:		]);
   322:		const zoneTitleHeight = 20;
   323:		if (tableStartY + zoneTitleHeight + headerRowHeight > maxContentY) {
   324:			doc.addPage();
   325:			tableStartY = drawPageHeader() + 8;
   326:		}
   327:
   328:		doc.font("Helvetica-Bold").fontSize(13).text(
   329:			`Zone: ${section.zoneName}`,
   330:			startX,
   331:			tableStartY,
   332:			{
   333:				width: contentWidth,
   334:			},
   335:		);
   336:		tableStartY += zoneTitleHeight;
   337:
   338:		tableStartY = drawTable(doc, startX, tableStartY, colWidths, {
   339:			headers,
   340:			rows,
   341:			...tableOptions,
   342:			drawPageHeader: () => drawPageHeader() + 8,
   343:		});
   344:		tableStartY += 12;
   345:	});
   346:
   347:	doc.end();
   348:	console.log(`拣货单已生成: ${outputPath}`);
   349:}
   350:
   351:function drawTable(doc, startX, startY, colWidths, options) {
   352:	const {
   353:		headers,
   354:		rows,
   355:		baseRowHeight,
   356:		headerFontSize,
   357:		bodyFontSize,
   358:		paddingX,
   359:		paddingY,
   360:		lineGap,
   361:		maxContentY,
   362:		drawPageHeader,
   363:	} = options;
   364:	const headerMeasureOptions = {
   365:		fontSize: headerFontSize,
   366:		paddingX,
   367:		paddingY,
   368:		baseRowHeight,
   369:		lineGap,
   370:	};
   371:	const bodyMeasureOptions = {
   372:		fontSize: bodyFontSize,
   373:		paddingX,
   374:		paddingY,
   375:		baseRowHeight,
   376:		lineGap,
   377:	};
   378:	let currentY = startY;
   379:
   380:	const renderHeaderRow = () => {
   381:		const rowHeight = measureTableRowHeight(doc, headers, colWidths, headerMeasureOptions);
   382:		if (currentY + rowHeight > maxContentY) {
   383:			doc.addPage();
   384:			currentY = drawPageHeader();
   385:		}
   386:		currentY = drawTableRow(doc, startX, currentY, headers, colWidths, rowHeight, {
   387:			fontName: "Helvetica-Bold",
   388:			fontSize: headerFontSize,
   389:			paddingX,
   390:			paddingY,
   391:			lineGap,
   392:		});
   393:	};
   394:
   395:	renderHeaderRow();
   396:
   397:	for (const row of rows) {
   398:		const rowHeight = measureTableRowHeight(doc, row, colWidths, bodyMeasureOptions);
   399:		if (currentY + rowHeight > maxContentY) {
   400:			doc.addPage();
   401:			currentY = drawPageHeader();
   402:			renderHeaderRow();
   403:		}
   404:		currentY = drawTableRow(doc, startX, currentY, row, colWidths, rowHeight, {
   405:			fontName: "Helvetica",
   406:			fontSize: bodyFontSize,
   407:			paddingX,
   408:			paddingY,
   409:			lineGap,
   410:		});
   411:	}
   412:
   413:	return currentY;
   414:}
   415:
   416:
   417:
   418:
   419:async function mergePDFs(folderPath, batchItem, upcPageRanges, upcUniqueList) {
   420:	try {
   421:		console.log(`开始合成PDF: ${folderPath}`);
   422:
   423:		const pdfFiles = fs
   424:			.readdirSync(folderPath)
   425:			.filter(
   426:				(file) =>
   427:					file.endsWith(".pdf") &&
   428:					file !== "merged.pdf" &&
   429:					file !== "pick-list.pdf",
   430:			);
   431:
   432:		console.log(`找到 ${pdfFiles.length} 个PDF文件`);
   433:
   434:		const mergedDoc = await PDFLibDocument.create();
   435:
   436:		for (const upc of upcUniqueList) {
   437:			if (!upcPageRanges[upc]) continue;
   438:			const upcInfo = upcPageRanges[upc];
   439:			const filePrefix = upcInfo.filePrefix;
   440:
   441:			console.log(`处理UPC: ${upc} (文件前缀: ${filePrefix})`);
   442:
   443:			const coverPath = path.join(
   444:				folderPath,
   445:				`cover-${filePrefix}.pdf`,
   446:			);
   447:			if (fs.existsSync(coverPath)) {
   448:				console.log(`  添加Cover页: ${coverPath}`);
   449:				const coverBytes = await readFile(coverPath);
   450:				const coverDoc = await PDFLibDocument.load(coverBytes);
   451:				const [coverPage] = await mergedDoc.copyPages(coverDoc, [0]);
   452:				mergedDoc.addPage(coverPage);
   453:			}
   454:
   455:			const upcPdfFiles = (upcInfo.orderedPdfFiles || []).filter((file) =>
   456:				pdfFiles.includes(file),
   457:			);
   458:			console.log(`  找到 ${upcPdfFiles.length} 个面单文件`);
   459:
   460:
   461:			for (const pdfFile of upcPdfFiles) {
   462:				const pdfPath = path.join(folderPath, pdfFile);
   463:				console.log(`    添加面单: ${pdfFile}`);
   464:				const pdfBytes = await readFile(pdfPath);
   465:				const pdfDoc = await PDFLibDocument.load(pdfBytes);
   466:				const pageCount = pdfDoc.getPageCount();
   467:
   468:				for (let i = 0; i < pageCount; i++) {
   469:					const [page] = await mergedDoc.copyPages(pdfDoc, [i]);
   470:					mergedDoc.addPage(page);
   471:				}
   472:			}
   473:		}
   474:
   475:		const pickListPath = path.join(folderPath, "pick-list.pdf");
   476:		if (fs.existsSync(pickListPath)) {
   477:			console.log(`添加拣货单: ${pickListPath}`);
   478:			const pickListBytes = await readFile(pickListPath);
   479:			const pickListDoc = await PDFLibDocument.load(pickListBytes);
   480:			const pickListPageCount = pickListDoc.getPageCount();
   481:
   482:			for (let copy = 0; copy < 2; copy++) {
   483:				for (let i = 0; i < pickListPageCount; i++) {
   484:					const [page] = await mergedDoc.copyPages(pickListDoc, [i]);
   485:					mergedDoc.addPage(page);
   486:				}
   487:			}
   488:		}
   489:
   490:		console.log(`合成文档共有 ${mergedDoc.getPageCount()} 页`);
   491:
   492:		const mergedPath = path.join(folderPath, "merged.pdf");
   493:		const mergedBytes = await mergedDoc.save();
   494:		await writeFile(mergedPath, mergedBytes);
   495:
   496:		console.log(`已保存合成文件: ${mergedPath}`);
   497:
   498:		const allPdfFiles = fs
   499:			.readdirSync(folderPath)
   500:			.filter((file) => file.endsWith(".pdf"));
   501:
   502:		console.log(`删除中间文件...`);
   503:		for (const pdfFile of allPdfFiles) {
   504:			if (pdfFile !== "merged.pdf") {
   505:				const pdfPath = path.join(folderPath, pdfFile);
   506:				fs.unlinkSync(pdfPath);
   507:			}
   508:		}
   509:
   510:		console.log(`PDF 合成完成: ${mergedPath}`);
   511:	} catch (error) {
   512:		console.error(`PDF 合成失败:`, error.message);
   513:		console.error(error.stack);
   514:	}
   515:}
   516:
   517:async function processSingleBatch(batchItem, batchFolder, showJson) {
   518:	console.log(`\n处理single批次: ${batchFolder}`);
   519:
   520:	if (fs.existsSync(batchFolder)) {
   521:		const existingFiles = fs.readdirSync(batchFolder);
   522:		for (const file of existingFiles) {
   523:			const filePath = path.join(batchFolder, file);
   524:			fs.unlinkSync(filePath);
   525:		}
   526:		console.log(`已清空文件夹: ${batchFolder}`);
   527:	} else {
   528:		fs.mkdirSync(batchFolder, { recursive: true });
   529:	}
   530:
   531:	const jsonFilePath = path.join(batchFolder, "order.json");
   532:	if (showJson) {
   533:		const jsonContent = JSON.stringify(batchItem, null, 2);
   534:		fs.writeFileSync(jsonFilePath, jsonContent, "utf8");
   535:		console.log(`已保存 JSON 文件: ${jsonFilePath}`);
   536:	} else {
   537:		if (fs.existsSync(jsonFilePath)) {
   538:			fs.unlinkSync(jsonFilePath);
   539:		}
   540:	}
   541:
   542:	generatePickList(batchItem, batchFolder);
   543:
   544:	const upcPageRanges = {};
   545:	const processedOrders = new Set();
   546:
   547:	for (let upcIndex = 0; upcIndex < batchItem.upcUniqueList.length; upcIndex++) {
   548:		const upc = batchItem.upcUniqueList[upcIndex];
   549:		const upcOrders = batchItem.orders[upcIndex] || [];
   550:		
   551:		if (upcOrders.length === 0) continue;
   552:		
   553:		const sanitizedUpc = sanitizeFileName(upc);
   554:		const prefix = `u${upcIndex.toString().padStart(3, "0")}`;
   555:		const filePrefix = `${prefix}_${sanitizedUpc}`;
   556:		const actualUpcOrders = [];
   557:		const orderedPdfFiles = [];
   558:		
   559:		for (const order of upcOrders) {
   560:
   561:			if (processedOrders.has(order.orderNo)) {
   562:				continue;
   563:			}
   564:			actualUpcOrders.push(order);
   565:			processedOrders.add(order.orderNo);
   566:		}
   567:
   568:		for (const [orderPosition, order] of actualUpcOrders.entries()) {
   569:			const orderPrefix = String(orderPosition + 1).padStart(3, "0");
   570:			const labelFileName = `${filePrefix}_${orderPrefix}_${order.orderNo}.pdf`;
   571:			const labelFilePath = path.join(batchFolder, labelFileName);
   572:			orderedPdfFiles.push(labelFileName);
   573:
   574:			try {
   575:				console.log(`正在下载: ${order.expressLabelUrl}`);
   576:				await downloadFile(order.expressLabelUrl, labelFilePath);
   577:				console.log(`下载完成: ${labelFilePath}`);
   578:			} catch (error) {
   579:				console.error(
   580:					`下载失败 ${order.expressLabelUrl}:`,
   581:					error.message,
   582:				);
   583:			}
   584:		}
   585:
   586:		upcPageRanges[upc] = {
   587:
   588:
   589:			start: 0,
   590:			end: 0,
   591:			sanitized: sanitizedUpc,
   592:			prefix: prefix,
   593:			filePrefix: filePrefix,
   594:			count: actualUpcOrders.length,
   595:			orderedPdfFiles,
   596:		};
   597:
   598:
   599:		if (actualUpcOrders.length > 0) {
   600:			const coverPath = path.join(
   601:				batchFolder,
   602:				`cover-${filePrefix}.pdf`,
   603:			);
   604:			generateCoverPage(upc, actualUpcOrders.length, coverPath);
   605:		}
   606:	}
   607:
   608:	await mergePDFs(batchFolder, batchItem, upcPageRanges, batchItem.upcUniqueList);
   609:}
   610:
   611:async function processMultipleBatch(batchItem, batchFolder, showJson) {
   612:	console.log(`\n处理multiple批次: ${batchFolder}`);
   613:
   614:	if (fs.existsSync(batchFolder)) {
   615:		const existingFiles = fs.readdirSync(batchFolder);
   616:		for (const file of existingFiles) {
   617:			const filePath = path.join(batchFolder, file);
   618:			fs.unlinkSync(filePath);
   619:		}
   620:		console.log(`已清空文件夹: ${batchFolder}`);
   621:	} else {
   622:		fs.mkdirSync(batchFolder, { recursive: true });
   623:	}
   624:
   625:	const jsonFilePath = path.join(batchFolder, "order.json");
   626:	if (showJson) {
   627:		const jsonContent = JSON.stringify(batchItem, null, 2);
   628:		fs.writeFileSync(jsonFilePath, jsonContent, "utf8");
   629:		console.log(`已保存 JSON 文件: ${jsonFilePath}`);
   630:	} else {
   631:		if (fs.existsSync(jsonFilePath)) {
   632:			fs.unlinkSync(jsonFilePath);
   633:		}
   634:	}
   635:
   636:	generatePickList(batchItem, batchFolder);
   637:
   638:	const upcPageRanges = {};
   639:	const processedOrders = new Set();
   640:	const processedUpcList = [];
   641:
   642:	for (let upcIndex = 0; upcIndex < batchItem.upcUniqueList.length; upcIndex++) {
   643:		const upcOrders = batchItem.orders[upcIndex] || [];
   644:		if (upcOrders.length === 0) continue;
   645:
   646:		const groupedOrders = splitMultipleOrdersByExactSku(upcOrders);
   647:
   648:		for (const [groupIndex, groupedOrder] of groupedOrders.entries()) {
   649:			const combinedUpc = groupedOrder.skuLines.join("");
   650:			const sanitizedUpc = sanitizeFileName(combinedUpc || groupedOrder.signature);
   651:			const prefix = `u${upcIndex.toString().padStart(3, "0")}g${groupIndex.toString().padStart(2, "0")}`;
   652:			const filePrefix = `${prefix}_${sanitizedUpc}`;
   653:			const actualUpcOrders = [];
   654:			const orderedPdfFiles = [];
   655:			const rangeKey = `${prefix}::${groupedOrder.signature}`;
   656:
   657:			for (const order of groupedOrder.orders) {
   658:				if (processedOrders.has(order.orderNo)) {
   659:					continue;
   660:				}
   661:				actualUpcOrders.push(order);
   662:				processedOrders.add(order.orderNo);
   663:			}
   664:
   665:			for (const [orderPosition, order] of actualUpcOrders.entries()) {
   666:				const orderPrefix = String(orderPosition + 1).padStart(3, "0");
   667:				const labelFileName = `${filePrefix}_${orderPrefix}_${order.orderNo}.pdf`;
   668:				const labelFilePath = path.join(batchFolder, labelFileName);
   669:				orderedPdfFiles.push(labelFileName);
   670:
   671:				try {
   672:					console.log(`正在下载: ${order.expressLabelUrl}`);
   673:					await downloadFile(order.expressLabelUrl, labelFilePath);
   674:					console.log(`下载完成: ${labelFilePath}`);
   675:				} catch (error) {
   676:					console.error(
   677:						`下载失败 ${order.expressLabelUrl}:`,
   678:						error.message,
   679:					);
   680:				}
   681:			}
   682:
   683:			upcPageRanges[rangeKey] = {
   684:				start: 0,
   685:				end: 0,
   686:				sanitized: sanitizedUpc,
   687:				prefix: prefix,
   688:				filePrefix: filePrefix,
   689:				count: actualUpcOrders.length,
   690:				orderedPdfFiles,
   691:			};
   692:
   693:			processedUpcList.push(rangeKey);
   694:
   695:			if (actualUpcOrders.length > 0) {
   696:				const coverPath = path.join(
   697:					batchFolder,
   698:					`cover-${filePrefix}.pdf`,
   699:				);
   700:				generateCoverPage(groupedOrder.skuLines, actualUpcOrders.length, coverPath);
   701:			}
   702:		}
   703:	}
   704:
   705:	await mergePDFs(batchFolder, batchItem, upcPageRanges, processedUpcList);
   706:}
   707:
   708:function printOptimizationStats(stats) {
   709:	for (const type of ["single", "multiple"]) {
   710:		const item = stats?.[type];
   711:		if (!item) continue;
   712:		console.log(`\n[${type}]`);
   713:		console.log(`- 原批次数: ${item.originalBatchCount}`);
   714:		console.log(`- 优化后批次数: ${item.optimizedBatchCount}`);
   715:		console.log(`- UPC组数: ${item.groupCount}`);
   716:		console.log(`- zone切换次数: ${item.totalZoneSwitches}`);
   717:		console.log(`- shelf切换次数: ${item.totalShelfSwitches}`);
   718:		console.log(`- 拣货明细行数: ${item.totalItems}`);
   719:	}
   720:}
   721:
   722:async function processOrders() {
   723:	const args = process.argv.slice(2);
   724:
   725:	if (args.length < 1) {
   726:		console.error(
   727:			"使用方法: node process-ordersV4.js <json文件> [输出文件夹名] [-JSON=true] [--box-size=15] [--skip-optimize]",
   728:		);
   729:		process.exit(1);
   730:	}
   731:
   732:	const jsonFilePath = args[0];
   733:	let outputDir = "output";
   734:	let showJson = false;
   735:	let shouldOptimize = true;
   736:	let boxSize = DEFAULT_OPTIMIZE_BOX_SIZE;
   737:
   738:	for (let i = 1; i < args.length; i++) {
   739:		const arg = args[i];
   740:		if (arg === "-JSON=true") {
   741:			showJson = true;
   742:		} else if (arg === "--skip-optimize") {
   743:			shouldOptimize = false;
   744:		} else if (arg.startsWith("--box-size=")) {
   745:			const value = Number(arg.split("=")[1]);
   746:			if (!Number.isFinite(value) || value <= 0) {
   747:				console.error("--box-size 必须是正整数");
   748:				process.exit(1);
   749:			}
   750:			boxSize = Math.floor(value);
   751:		} else {
   752:			outputDir = arg;
   753:		}
   754:	}
   755:
   756:	if (!fs.existsSync(jsonFilePath)) {
   757:		console.error(`文件不存在: ${jsonFilePath}`);
   758:		process.exit(1);
   759:	}
   760:
   761:	const rawJsonData = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(jsonFilePath, "utf8"));
   762:	const optimizationResult = shouldOptimize
   763:		? optimizePickingData(rawJsonData, boxSize)
   764:		: null;
   765:	const jsonData = optimizationResult?.optimizedData || rawJsonData;
   766:
   767:	if (optimizationResult) {
   768:		fs.writeFileSync(jsonFilePath, JSON.stringify(jsonData, null, 2), "utf8");
   769:		console.log("=== 已先执行拣货批次优化 ===");
   770:		console.log(`每批最大聚合后UPC数: ${boxSize}`);
   771:
   772:		console.log(`优化后的 JSON 已覆盖原文件: ${jsonFilePath}`);
   773:		printOptimizationStats(optimizationResult.stats);
   774:	}
   775:
   776:	if (!fs.existsSync(outputDir)) {
   777:
   778:		fs.mkdirSync(outputDir, { recursive: true });
   779:	}
   780:
   781:	console.log("\n=== 开始处理订单 ===");
   782:
   783:	for (const type of ["single", "multiple"]) {
   784:		if (jsonData[type]) {
   785:			const typeFolder = path.join(outputDir, type);
   786:			if (!fs.existsSync(typeFolder)) {
   787:				fs.mkdirSync(typeFolder);
   788:			}
   789:
   790:			for (let i = 0; i < jsonData[type].length; i++) {
   791:				const batchItem = jsonData[type][i];
   792:				const batchFolder = path.join(typeFolder, `Batch_${i + 1}`);
   793:				if (type === "single") {
   794:					await processSingleBatch(batchItem, batchFolder, showJson);
   795:				} else {
   796:					await processMultipleBatch(
   797:						batchItem,
   798:						batchFolder,
   799:						showJson,
   800:					);
   801:				}
   802:			}
   803:		}
   804:	}
   805:
   806:	console.log(`\n所有处理完成！输出目录: ${outputDir}`);
   807:}
   808:
   809:if (require.main === module) {
   810:	processOrders().catch(console.error);
   811:}
   812:
   813:module.exports = {
   814:	processOrders,
   815:};
   816:
   817:
</file_contents>

<file_contents path='f:\work\tianjuGeneratePdfScript\optimize-pick-batches.js' isFullFile='true'>
     1:const fs = require("fs");
     2:const path = require("path");
     3:
     4:/**
     5: * 这个脚本的目标不是改业务数据，而是在不破坏 `upcUniqueList[i] <-> orders[i]`
     6: * 对应关系的前提下，按“更方便拣货”的方式重排 JSON。
     7: *
     8: * 核心思路：
     9: * 1. 把每个 `upcUniqueList[i] + orders[i]` 视为一个不可拆分的 group。
    10: * 2. 从 `labelDesc` 提取 zone / shelf 信息，判断哪些 group 更接近。
    11: * 3. 用启发式评分把相近 group 尽量放进同一批，减少跨区、跨货架来回走动。
    12: * 4. `single` 组内再按件数从大到小排序，优先处理大单。
    13: *
    14: * 注意：这里计算的不是仓库里的真实物理距离，而是把货位名映射成一个近似的
    15: * `travelIndex`（行走顺序索引），用于排序和聚类，让输出更贴近拣货路径。
    16: */
    17:const DEFAULT_BOX_SIZE = 15;
    18:const SHELF_PREFIX_ORDER = [
    19:	"AA",
    20:	"BB",
    21:	"CC",
    22:	"DD",
    23:	"EE",
    24:	"FF",
    25:	"GG",
    26:	"HH",
    27:	"JJ",
    28:	"KK",
    29:	"LL",
    30:	"MM",
    31:	"NN",
    32:	"PP",
    33:	"QQ",
    34:	"RR",
    35:	"SS",
    36:	"TT",
    37:	"UU",
    38:	"VV",
    39:	"WW",
    40:	"XX",
    41:	"YY",
    42:];
    43:const SHELF_POSITION_CACHE = new Map();
    44:const KNOWN_DOUBLE_PREFIX_RANK = new Map(
    45:	SHELF_PREFIX_ORDER.map((prefix, index) => [prefix, index]),
    46:);
    47:
    48:/**
    49: * 解析命令行参数，并补全默认输出路径。
    50: *
    51: * @param {string[]} argv Node.js 原始命令行参数，一般直接传 `process.argv`。
    52: * @returns {{ inputPath: string, outputPath: string, boxSize: number }}
    53: * 返回标准化后的输入路径、输出路径和每批最大装箱数。
    54: */
    55:function parseArgs(argv) {
    56:
    57:	const args = argv.slice(2);
    58:	if (args.length < 1) {
    59:		console.error(
    60:			"使用方法: node optimize-pick-batches.js <输入JSON> [输出JSON] [--box-size=15]",
    61:		);
    62:		process.exit(1);
    63:	}
    64:
    65:	const options = {
    66:		inputPath: path.resolve(args[0]),
    67:		outputPath: "",
    68:		boxSize: DEFAULT_BOX_SIZE,
    69:	};
    70:
    71:	for (let i = 1; i < args.length; i++) {
    72:		const arg = args[i];
    73:		if (arg.startsWith("--box-size=")) {
    74:			const value = Number(arg.split("=")[1]);
    75:			if (!Number.isFinite(value) || value <= 0) {
    76:				console.error("--box-size 必须是正整数");
    77:				process.exit(1);
    78:			}
    79:			options.boxSize = Math.floor(value);
    80:		} else if (!options.outputPath) {
    81:			options.outputPath = path.resolve(arg);
    82:		}
    83:	}
    84:
    85:	if (!options.outputPath) {
    86:		const parsed = path.parse(options.inputPath);
    87:		options.outputPath = path.join(
    88:			parsed.dir,
    89:			`${parsed.name}.optimized${parsed.ext || ".json"}`,
    90:		);
    91:	}
    92:
    93:	return options;
    94:}
    95:
    96:/**
    97: * 读取并解析 JSON 文件。
    98: *
    99: * @param {string} filePath JSON 文件绝对路径或相对路径。
   100: * @returns {Record<string, any>} 解析后的订单数据对象。
   101: */
   102:function readJson(filePath) {
   103:	return JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(filePath, "utf8"));
   104:}
   105:
   106:/**
   107: * 将优化结果写回 JSON 文件。
   108: *
   109: * @param {string} filePath 输出文件路径。
   110: * @param {Record<string, any>} data 需要写入的 JSON 对象。
   111: * @returns {void}
   112: */
   113:function writeJson(filePath, data) {
   114:	fs.writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), "utf8");
   115:}
   116:
   117:/**
   118: * 从 `Shiliu-lv*4` 这类描述中提取件数。
   119: *
   120: * @param {string} upcDesc 单个 `upcDescList` 项。
   121: * @returns {number} 提取到的数量；如果末尾没有 `*数字`，默认返回 `1`。
   122: */
   123:function parseQuantity(upcDesc) {
   124:	const match = String(upcDesc || "").match(/\*(\d+)$/);
   125:	return match ? Number(match[1]) : 1;
   126:}
   127:
   128:/**
   129: * 统计单个订单的总件数。
   130: *
   131: * @param {{ upcDescList?: string[] }} order 订单对象。
   132: * @returns {number} 订单中所有 `upcDescList` 项累加后的总件数。
   133: */
   134:function getOrderPieceCount(order) {
   135:	const upcDescList = Array.isArray(order?.upcDescList) ? order.upcDescList : [];
   136:	let total = 0;
   137:	for (const upcDesc of upcDescList) {
   138:		total += parseQuantity(upcDesc);
   139:	}
   140:	return total;
   141:}
   142:
   143:/**
   144: * 按订单总件数从大到小排序；同件数时按订单号稳定排序。
   145: *
   146: * @param {Array<{ orderNo?: string, upcDescList?: string[] }>} orders 原始订单数组。
   147: * @returns {Array<{ orderNo?: string, upcDescList?: string[] }>} 排序后的新数组，不修改原数组。
   148: */
   149:function sortOrdersByQuantityDesc(orders) {
   150:	return [...orders].sort((a, b) => {
   151:		const quantityDiff = getOrderPieceCount(b) - getOrderPieceCount(a);
   152:		if (quantityDiff !== 0) return quantityDiff;
   153:		return String(a?.orderNo || "").localeCompare(String(b?.orderNo || ""));
   154:	});
   155:}
   156:
   157:/**
   158: * 估算一个 group 在 `single` 模式下占用多少“装箱槽位”。
   159: *
   160: * `single` 不做最终聚合，仍沿用原来的单组估算方式；
   161: * `multiple` 则改为按最终聚合后的输出 key 数来控批，不再直接使用这个值做容量判断。
   162: *
   163: * @param {Array<{ upcDescList?: string[] }>} orders 该 group 对应的订单数组。
   164: * @returns {number} 当前 group 的槽位成本，至少为 `1`。
   165: */
   166:function getSingleGroupSlotCost(orders) {
   167:	const firstOrder = orders.find((item) => item && Array.isArray(item.upcDescList));
   168:	return Math.max(firstOrder?.upcDescList?.length || 1, 1);
   169:}
   170:
   171:/**
   172: * 构造 `multiple` 最终聚合时使用的唯一 key。
   173: *
   174: * 这里必须与 `aggregateOutputLabelItems` 的聚合口径保持一致，这样装箱时限制的
   175: * 才是“最终拣货单真正会显示出来的明细数”。
   176: *
   177: * @param {{ zoneNo?: string, zoneName?: string, shelfNo?: string, shelfName?: string, upc?: string, sku?: string }} rawItem 原始明细项。
   178: * @returns {string} 可用于去重统计的稳定 key。
   179: */
   180:function buildAggregatedOutputItemKey(rawItem) {
   181:	const item = normalizeLabelItem(rawItem, rawItem?.zoneName);
   182:	return [
   183:		item.zoneNo,
   184:		item.zoneName,
   185:		item.shelfNo,
   186:		item.shelfName,
   187:		item.upc,
   188:		item.sku,
   189:	].join("||");
   190:}
   191:
   192:/**
   193: * 为一个 group 预先计算“最终聚合后会贡献哪些输出项 key”。
   194: *
   195: * @param {"single"|"multiple"} type 当前处理的数据类型。
   196: * @param {Array<Record<string, any>>} labelItems 当前 group 的货位明细。
   197: * @returns {Set<string>} 该 group 的输出项 key 集合。
   198: */
   199:function buildGroupOutputItemKeySet(type, labelItems) {
   200:	if (type !== "multiple") {
   201:		return new Set();
   202:	}
   203:
   204:	const keySet = new Set();
   205:	for (const item of labelItems || []) {
   206:		keySet.add(buildAggregatedOutputItemKey(item));
   207:	}
   208:	return keySet;
   209:}
   210:
   211:
   212:/**
   213: * 统一清洗 `labelDesc.items` 中的单条明细，补齐字段兜底值。
   214: *
   215: * @param {Record<string, any>} item 原始货位明细项。
   216: * @param {string} fallbackZoneName 当 `item.zoneName` 缺失时使用的 zone 名称。
   217: * @returns {{ zoneNo: string, zoneName: string, shelfNo: string, shelfName: string, upc: string, sku: string, orderNo: string, num: number }}
   218: * 统一结构后的标签明细。
   219: */
   220:function normalizeLabelItem(item, fallbackZoneName) {
   221:	return {
   222:		zoneNo: item?.zoneNo || "",
   223:		zoneName: item?.zoneName || fallbackZoneName || "UNKNOWN",
   224:		shelfNo: item?.shelfNo || "",
   225:		shelfName: item?.shelfName || "UNKNOWN",
   226:		upc: item?.upc || item?.sku || "",
   227:		sku: item?.sku || "",
   228:		orderNo: item?.orderNo || "",
   229:		num: Number(item?.num) || 0,
   230:	};
   231:}
   232:
   233:/**
   234: * 从 `MNTZ-D-004*3` 这类描述中提取 UPC 编码。
   235: *
   236: * @param {string} upcDesc 单个 `upcDescList` 项。
   237: * @returns {string} 去掉末尾数量标记后的 UPC 文本。
   238: */
   239:function extractUpc(upcDesc) {
   240:	return String(upcDesc || "").replace(/\*\d+$/, "").trim();
   241:}
   242:
   243:/**
   244: * 向数量 Map 中累加指定键的数量。
   245: *
   246: * @param {Map<string, number>} quantityMap 目标数量表。
   247: * @param {string} key 需要累加的键。
   248: * @param {number} qty 本次增加的数量。
   249: * @returns {void}
   250: */
   251:function addQuantityToMap(quantityMap, key, qty) {
   252:	if (!key) return;
   253:	const value = Number(qty) || 0;
   254:	if (value <= 0) return;
   255:	quantityMap.set(key, (quantityMap.get(key) || 0) + value);
   256:}
   257:
   258:/**
   259: * 汇总一组订单里的 UPC 需求量。
   260: *
   261: * @param {Array<{ upcDescList?: string[] }>} orders 当前 group 对应的订单数组。
   262: * @returns {Map<string, number>} key 为 UPC，value 为当前 group 需要的总数量。
   263: */
   264:function buildUpcDemandMap(orders) {
   265:	const demandMap = new Map();
   266:	for (const order of orders || []) {
   267:		for (const upcDesc of Array.isArray(order?.upcDescList) ? order.upcDescList : []) {
   268:			addQuantityToMap(demandMap, extractUpc(upcDesc), parseQuantity(upcDesc));
   269:		}
   270:	}
   271:	return demandMap;
   272:}
   273:
   274:/**
   275: * 扁平化 `labelDesc`，统一得到便于后续分配的货位明细数组。
   276: *
   277: * @param {Array<{ zoneName?: string, items?: Array<Record<string, any>> }>} labelDesc 原始批次中的货位明细。
   278: * @returns {Array<{ zoneNo: string, zoneName: string, shelfNo: string, shelfName: string, upc: string, sku: string, orderNo: string, num: number }>}
   279: * 清洗后的扁平化货位明细数组。
   280: */
   281:function flattenLabelItems(labelDesc) {
   282:	const labelItems = [];
   283:	if (!Array.isArray(labelDesc)) {
   284:		return labelItems;
   285:	}
   286:
   287:	for (const zone of labelDesc) {
   288:		const zoneName = zone?.zoneName || "UNKNOWN";
   289:		for (const rawItem of Array.isArray(zone?.items) ? zone.items : []) {
   290:			labelItems.push(normalizeLabelItem(rawItem, zoneName));
   291:		}
   292:	}
   293:
   294:	return labelItems;
   295:}
   296:
   297:/**
   298: * 按订单号把 `labelDesc` 建成索引，便于后面快速回收某个 group 的所有货位信息。
   299: *
   300: * @param {Array<{ zoneName?: string, items?: Array<Record<string, any>> }>} labelDesc 原始批次中的货位明细。
   301: * @returns {Map<string, Array<{ zoneNo: string, zoneName: string, shelfNo: string, shelfName: string, upc: string, sku: string, orderNo: string, num: number }>>}
   302: * key 为 `orderNo`，value 为该订单对应的所有货位行。
   303: */
   304:function buildOrderLabelMap(labelDesc) {
   305:	const orderLabelMap = new Map();
   306:	for (const item of flattenLabelItems(labelDesc)) {
   307:		if (!item.orderNo) continue;
   308:		if (!orderLabelMap.has(item.orderNo)) {
   309:			orderLabelMap.set(item.orderNo, []);
   310:		}
   311:		orderLabelMap.get(item.orderNo).push(item);
   312:	}
   313:	return orderLabelMap;
   314:}
   315:
   316:/**
   317: * 为 `multiple` 批次创建一个可递减分配的货位池。
   318: *
   319: * @param {Array<{ zoneName?: string, items?: Array<Record<string, any>> }>} labelDesc 原始批次中的货位明细。
   320: * @returns {Array<{ item: Record<string, any>, remaining: number }>} 可按数量逐步消耗的货位池。
   321: */
   322:function createLabelPool(labelDesc) {
   323:	return flattenLabelItems(labelDesc).map((item) => ({
   324:		item,
   325:		remaining: Math.max(Number(item.num) || 0, 0),
   326:	}));
   327:}
   328:
   329:/**
   330: * 按 UPC 需求从货位池中切出当前 group 需要的明细。
   331: *
   332: * `multiple` 批次里的 `labelDesc.items[].orderNo` 经常只是整批汇总时的代表值，
   333: * 不能再按订单号反查；这里改为按 UPC 数量从原批次货位池里顺序分配，避免明细丢失。
   334: *
   335: * @param {Map<string, number>} demandMap 当前 group 的 UPC 需求量。
   336: * @param {Array<{ item: Record<string, any>, remaining: number }>} labelPool 原批次剩余可分配的货位池。
   337: * @param {string} fallbackOrderNo 当前 group 的兜底订单号，仅用于保持输出稳定。
   338: * @returns {Array<Record<string, any>>} 分配给当前 group 的货位明细。
   339: */
   340:function allocateLabelItemsByDemand(demandMap, labelPool, fallbackOrderNo = "") {
   341:	const allocatedItems = [];
   342:
   343:	for (const [upc, demandQty] of demandMap.entries()) {
   344:		let remainingDemand = Number(demandQty) || 0;
   345:		if (!upc || remainingDemand <= 0) continue;
   346:
   347:		for (const entry of labelPool || []) {
   348:			if (remainingDemand <= 0) break;
   349:			if ((entry?.remaining || 0) <= 0) continue;
   350:			const itemUpc = entry?.item?.upc || entry?.item?.sku || "";
   351:			if (itemUpc !== upc) continue;
   352:
   353:			const takeQty = Math.min(entry.remaining, remainingDemand);
   354:			if (takeQty <= 0) continue;
   355:
   356:			allocatedItems.push({
   357:				...entry.item,
   358:				orderNo: fallbackOrderNo || entry.item.orderNo,
   359:				num: takeQty,
   360:			});
   361:			entry.remaining -= takeQty;
   362:			remainingDemand -= takeQty;
   363:		}
   364:	}
   365:
   366:	return allocatedItems;
   367:}
   368:
   369:
   370:
   371:/**
   372: * 以“自然排序”比较两个文本值。
   373: *
   374: * @param {string} a 左侧文本。
   375: * @param {string} b 右侧文本。
   376: * @returns {number} 适用于 `Array.prototype.sort` 的比较结果。
   377: */
   378:function compareNaturalText(a, b) {
   379:	return String(a || "").localeCompare(String(b || ""), undefined, {
   380:		numeric: true,
   381:		sensitivity: "base",
   382:	});
   383:}
   384:
   385:/**
   386: * 把通用字母前缀编码为可比较的序号。
   387: *
   388: * @param {string} prefix 例如 `A`、`H`、`TT`。
   389: * @returns {number} 可用于排序的前缀权重值。
   390: */
   391:function getGenericPrefixRank(prefix) {
   392:	let rank = 0;
   393:	for (const char of String(prefix || "")) {
   394:		const code = char.charCodeAt(0);
   395:		const normalizedCode = code >= 65 && code <= 90 ? code - 64 : 27;
   396:		rank = rank * 27 + normalizedCode;
   397:	}
   398:	return rank;
   399:}
   400:
   401:/**
   402: * 将数字或特殊标记统一编码为可比较的数值。
   403: *
   404: * @param {number|string|undefined} token 拆分出来的单段 token。
   405: * @param {number} [fallback=999] token 无法识别时的兜底值。
   406: * @returns {number} 标准化后的数值，用于排序和构造 `travelIndex`。
   407: */
   408:function encodeTokenValue(token, fallback = 999) {
   409:	if (typeof token === "number" && Number.isFinite(token)) {
   410:		return token;
   411:	}
   412:	if (token === "TOP") {
   413:		return 900;
   414:	}
   415:	return fallback;
   416:}
   417:
   418:/**
   419: * 解析非 2220 仓的通用货位格式。
   420: *
   421: * @param {string} prefix 货位前缀字母区，如 `T`、`H`、`A`。
   422: * @param {string} remainder 去掉前缀后的剩余部分，如 `15_10`、`017-3-1`。
   423: * @returns {{ prefix: string, number: number, row: number, column: number, side: number, detail: number, travelIndex: number }}
   424: * 统一后的货位位置对象。
   425: */
   426:function parseGenericShelfPosition(prefix, remainder) {
   427:	// 兼容 `T10`、`H15_1`、`H15_10`、`A017-3-1`、`A016-TOP` 这类非 2220 仓格式。
   428:	// 规则上按“字母区 + 主编号 + 子位/层位”做自然排序，用于近似拣货路径。
   429:	const tokens = String(remainder || "").match(/[A-Z]+|\d+/g) || [];
   430:
   431:	const parsedTokens = tokens.map((token) =>
   432:		/^\d+$/.test(token) ? Number(token) : token,
   433:	);
   434:	const number = encodeTokenValue(parsedTokens[0]);
   435:	const side = encodeTokenValue(parsedTokens[1], 0);
   436:	const detail = encodeTokenValue(parsedTokens[2], 0);
   437:	const row = 1000 + getGenericPrefixRank(prefix);
   438:	return {
   439:		prefix,
   440:		number,
   441:		row,
   442:		column: number,
   443:		side,
   444:		detail,
   445:		travelIndex: row * 1000000 + number * 10000 + side * 100 + detail,
   446:	};
   447:}
   448:
   449:/**
   450: * 解析货位名称，并转换为统一可比较的位置对象。
   451: *
   452: * @param {string} shelfName 原始货位名，如 `AA001`、`T10`、`H15_10`。
   453: * @returns {{ prefix: string, number: number, row: number, column: number, side: number, detail: number, travelIndex: number }}
   454: * 供货位比较、路径估算和聚类评分使用的标准位置对象。
   455: */
   456:function parseShelfPosition(shelfName) {
   457:	// 把货架编码映射成“相对行走顺序”，用于近似判断两个货位是否靠近。
   458:	// 这不是精确物理距离，但足够支撑批次聚类和拣货顺序优化。
   459:	const normalized = String(shelfName || "").trim().toUpperCase();
   460:	if (SHELF_POSITION_CACHE.has(normalized)) {
   461:		return SHELF_POSITION_CACHE.get(normalized);
   462:	}
   463:
   464:	let position;
   465:	const knownDoubleMatch = normalized.match(/^([A-Z]{2})(\d{3})$/);
   466:	if (knownDoubleMatch && KNOWN_DOUBLE_PREFIX_RANK.has(knownDoubleMatch[1])) {
   467:		const [, prefix, numStr] = knownDoubleMatch;
   468:		const number = Number(numStr);
   469:		const row = KNOWN_DOUBLE_PREFIX_RANK.get(prefix);
   470:		const isLowerRow = number <= 15;
   471:		const column = isLowerRow ? 15 - number : number - 16;
   472:		const side = isLowerRow ? 1 : 0;
   473:		position = {
   474:			prefix,
   475:			number,
   476:			row,
   477:			column,
   478:			side,
   479:			detail: 0,
   480:			travelIndex: row * 1000000 + column * 100 + side,
   481:		};
   482:	} else {
   483:		const genericMatch = normalized.match(/^([A-Z]+)(.*)$/);
   484:		if (genericMatch) {
   485:			const [, prefix, remainder] = genericMatch;
   486:			position = parseGenericShelfPosition(prefix, remainder);
   487:		} else if (/^\d+$/.test(normalized)) {
   488:			const number = Number(normalized);
   489:			position = {
   490:				prefix: "NUM",
   491:				number,
   492:				row: 5000,
   493:				column: number,
   494:				side: 0,
   495:				detail: 0,
   496:				travelIndex: 5000 * 1000000 + number * 10000,
   497:			};
   498:		} else {
   499:			position = {
   500:				prefix: "ZZ",
   501:				number: 999,
   502:				row: 9999,
   503:				column: 999,
   504:				side: 999,
   505:				detail: 999,
   506:				travelIndex: 9999999999,
   507:			};
   508:		}
   509:	}
   510:
   511:	SHELF_POSITION_CACHE.set(normalized, position);
   512:	return position;
   513:}
   514:
   515:/**
   516: * 按统一货位规则比较两个 `shelfName`。
   517: *
   518: * @param {string} a 左侧货位名。
   519: * @param {string} b 右侧货位名。
   520: * @returns {number} 适用于排序的比较结果。
   521: */
   522:function compareShelves(a, b) {
   523:	const pa = parseShelfPosition(a);
   524:	const pb = parseShelfPosition(b);
   525:	if (pa.row !== pb.row) return pa.row - pb.row;
   526:	if (pa.column !== pb.column) return pa.column - pb.column;
   527:	if (pa.side !== pb.side) return pa.side - pb.side;
   528:	if (pa.detail !== pb.detail) return pa.detail - pb.detail;
   529:	return compareNaturalText(a, b);
   530:}
   531:
   532:/**
   533: * 比较两个 zone 名称，采用数值友好的自然顺序。
   534: *
   535: * @param {string} a 左侧 zone 名。
   536: * @param {string} b 右侧 zone 名。
   537: * @returns {number} 适用于排序的比较结果。
   538: */
   539:function compareZones(a, b) {
   540:	return String(a || "").localeCompare(String(b || ""), undefined, {
   541:		numeric: true,
   542:		sensitivity: "base",
   543:	});
   544:}
   545:
   546:/**
   547: * 用于 `labelDesc.items` 的最终排序：先 zone，再 shelf，再 upc，最后 orderNo。
   548: *
   549: * @param {{ zoneName?: string, shelfName?: string, upc?: string, orderNo?: string }} a 左侧明细。
   550: * @param {{ zoneName?: string, shelfName?: string, upc?: string, orderNo?: string }} b 右侧明细。
   551: * @returns {number} 适用于排序的比较结果。
   552: */
   553:function compareLabelItems(a, b) {
   554:	const zoneCompare = compareZones(a.zoneName, b.zoneName);
   555:	if (zoneCompare !== 0) return zoneCompare;
   556:	const shelfCompare = compareShelves(a.shelfName, b.shelfName);
   557:	if (shelfCompare !== 0) return shelfCompare;
   558:	const upcCompare = String(a.upc || "").localeCompare(String(b.upc || ""));
   559:	if (upcCompare !== 0) return upcCompare;
   560:	return String(a.orderNo || "").localeCompare(String(b.orderNo || ""));
   561:}
   562:
   563:/**
   564: * 汇总一个 group 的货位特征，用于后续排序、聚类和评分。
   565: *
   566: * @param {Array<{ zoneName?: string, shelfName?: string, num?: number }>} labelItems 当前 group 关联到的全部货位明细。
   567: * @returns {{
   568: *   zoneSet: Set<string>,
   569: *   shelfSet: Set<string>,
   570: *   prefixSet: Set<string>,
   571: *   zoneNames: string[],
   572: *   shelfNames: string[],
   573: *   dominantZone: string,
   574: *   dominantShelf: string,
   575: *   anchorShelfKey: string,
   576: *   anchorPosition: { prefix: string, number: number, row: number, column: number, side: number, detail: number, travelIndex: number },
   577: *   totalQty: number,
   578: *   minTravelIndex: number,
   579: *   maxTravelIndex: number,
   580: *   avgTravelIndex: number
   581: * }} 该 group 的位置摘要信息。
   582: */
   583:function buildLocationSummary(labelItems) {
   584:	const zoneWeights = new Map();
   585:	const shelfWeights = new Map();
   586:	const zoneShelfWeights = new Map();
   587:	const zoneSet = new Set();
   588:	const shelfSet = new Set();
   589:	const prefixSet = new Set();
   590:	let totalQty = 0;
   591:	let weightedTravelIndex = 0;
   592:	let minTravelIndex = Infinity;
   593:	let maxTravelIndex = -Infinity;
   594:
   595:	for (const item of labelItems) {
   596:		const qty = Number(item.num) || 1;
   597:		const zoneName = item.zoneName || "UNKNOWN";
   598:		const shelfName = item.shelfName || "UNKNOWN";
   599:		const shelfKey = `${zoneName}__${shelfName}`;
   600:		const position = parseShelfPosition(shelfName);
   601:
   602:		totalQty += qty;
   603:		weightedTravelIndex += position.travelIndex * qty;
   604:		minTravelIndex = Math.min(minTravelIndex, position.travelIndex);
   605:		maxTravelIndex = Math.max(maxTravelIndex, position.travelIndex);
   606:		zoneSet.add(zoneName);
   607:		shelfSet.add(shelfName);
   608:		prefixSet.add(position.prefix);
   609:		zoneWeights.set(zoneName, (zoneWeights.get(zoneName) || 0) + qty);
   610:		shelfWeights.set(shelfName, (shelfWeights.get(shelfName) || 0) + qty);
   611:		zoneShelfWeights.set(shelfKey, (zoneShelfWeights.get(shelfKey) || 0) + qty);
   612:	}
   613:
   614:	const dominantZone = pickMaxKey(zoneWeights) || "UNKNOWN";
   615:	const dominantShelf = pickMaxKey(shelfWeights) || "UNKNOWN";
   616:	const anchorShelfKey = pickMaxKey(zoneShelfWeights) || `${dominantZone}__${dominantShelf}`;
   617:	const [, anchorShelfName = dominantShelf] = anchorShelfKey.split("__");
   618:	const anchorPosition = parseShelfPosition(anchorShelfName);
   619:	const fallbackTravelIndex = anchorPosition.travelIndex;
   620:
   621:	return {
   622:		zoneSet,
   623:		shelfSet,
   624:		prefixSet,
   625:		zoneNames: [...zoneSet].sort(compareZones),
   626:		shelfNames: [...shelfSet].sort(compareShelves),
   627:		dominantZone,
   628:		dominantShelf,
   629:		anchorShelfKey,
   630:		anchorPosition,
   631:		totalQty,
   632:		minTravelIndex: Number.isFinite(minTravelIndex)
   633:			? minTravelIndex
   634:			: fallbackTravelIndex,
   635:		maxTravelIndex: Number.isFinite(maxTravelIndex)
   636:			? maxTravelIndex
   637:			: fallbackTravelIndex,
   638:		avgTravelIndex:
   639:			totalQty > 0 ? weightedTravelIndex / totalQty : fallbackTravelIndex,
   640:	};
   641:}
   642:
   643:
   644:/**
   645: * 从权重 Map 中找出权重最大的 key。
   646: *
   647: * @param {Map<string, number>} weightMap 权重表。
   648: * @returns {string} 权重最大的 key；如果为空 Map，则返回空字符串。
   649: */
   650:function pickMaxKey(weightMap) {
   651:	let bestKey = "";
   652:	let bestValue = -Infinity;
   653:	for (const [key, value] of weightMap.entries()) {
   654:		if (value > bestValue) {
   655:			bestKey = key;
   656:			bestValue = value;
   657:		}
   658:	}
   659:	return bestKey;
   660:}
   661:
   662:/**
   663: * 汇总一个 group 中订单相关的基础信息。
   664: *
   665: * @param {"single"|"multiple"} type 当前处理的数据类型。
   666: * @param {Array<{ orderNo?: string, upcDescList?: string[] }>} rawOrders 原始订单数组。
   667: * @returns {{ orders: Array<Record<string, any>>, orderNoList: string[], pieceCount: number }}
   668: * 返回排序后的订单数组、去重订单号列表和总件数。
   669: */
   670:function summarizeOrders(type, rawOrders) {
   671:	const orders = type === "single" ? sortOrdersByQuantityDesc(rawOrders) : [...rawOrders];
   672:	const orderNoSet = new Set();
   673:	let pieceCount = 0;
   674:
   675:	for (const order of orders) {
   676:		if (order?.orderNo) {
   677:			orderNoSet.add(order.orderNo);
   678:		}
   679:		const upcDescList = Array.isArray(order?.upcDescList) ? order.upcDescList : [];
   680:		for (const upcDesc of upcDescList) {
   681:			pieceCount += parseQuantity(upcDesc);
   682:		}
   683:	}
   684:
   685:	return {
   686:		orders,
   687:		orderNoList: [...orderNoSet],
   688:		pieceCount,
   689:	};
   690:}
   691:
   692:/**
   693: * 按订单号列表从 `orderLabelMap` 中回收当前 group 对应的全部货位行。
   694: *
   695: * @param {string[]} orderNoList 当前 group 的订单号列表。
   696: * @param {Map<string, Array<Record<string, any>>>} orderLabelMap 按订单号建立的货位索引。
   697: * @returns {Array<Record<string, any>>} 当前 group 对应的全部 `labelItems`。
   698: */
   699:function collectLabelItems(orderNoList, orderLabelMap) {
   700:	const labelItems = [];
   701:	for (const orderNo of orderNoList) {
   702:		const items = orderLabelMap.get(orderNo);
   703:		if (items?.length) {
   704:			labelItems.push(...items);
   705:		}
   706:	}
   707:	return labelItems;
   708:}
   709:
   710:/**
   711: * 将原始批次拆成可稳定重排的 group 列表。
   712: *
   713: * @param {"single"|"multiple"} type 当前处理的数据类型。
   714: * @param {Array<Record<string, any>>} batches 原始批次数组。
   715: * @returns {Array<{
   716: *   id: string,
   717: *   type: string,
   718: *   originalBatchIndex: number,
   719: *   upcUnique: string,
   720: *   orders: Array<Record<string, any>>,
   721: *   orderNoList: string[],
   722: *   labelItems: Array<Record<string, any>>,
   723: *   slotCost: number,
   724: *   pieceCount: number,
   725: *   location: ReturnType<typeof buildLocationSummary>
   726: * }>} 可直接用于后续优化的 group 列表。
   727: */
   728:function buildGroups(type, batches) {
   729:	// 这里的 group 就是一个稳定重排单元：`upcUniqueList[i] + orders[i]`。
   730:	// 后续无论怎么换批次、换顺序，都不会把这个对应关系拆开。
   731:	const groups = [];
   732:
   733:	for (let batchIndex = 0; batchIndex < (batches || []).length; batchIndex++) {
   734:		const batch = batches[batchIndex] || {};
   735:		const orderLabelMap = type === "single" ? buildOrderLabelMap(batch.labelDesc) : null;
   736:		const labelPool = type === "multiple" ? createLabelPool(batch.labelDesc) : null;
   737:		const upcUniqueList = Array.isArray(batch.upcUniqueList) ? batch.upcUniqueList : [];
   738:		const ordersList = Array.isArray(batch.orders) ? batch.orders : [];
   739:
   740:		for (let groupIndex = 0; groupIndex < upcUniqueList.length; groupIndex++) {
   741:			const upcUnique = upcUniqueList[groupIndex];
   742:			const rawOrders = Array.isArray(ordersList[groupIndex]) ? ordersList[groupIndex] : [];
   743:			if (!rawOrders.length) continue;
   744:
   745:			const { orders, orderNoList, pieceCount } = summarizeOrders(type, rawOrders);
   746:			const labelItems = type === "multiple"
   747:				? allocateLabelItemsByDemand(buildUpcDemandMap(orders), labelPool, orderNoList[0] || "")
   748:				: collectLabelItems(orderNoList, orderLabelMap);
   749:			const outputItemKeySet = buildGroupOutputItemKeySet(type, labelItems);
   750:
   751:			groups.push({
   752:				id: `${type}-${batchIndex}-${groupIndex}`,
   753:				type,
   754:				originalBatchIndex: batchIndex,
   755:				upcUnique,
   756:				orders,
   757:				orderNoList,
   758:				labelItems,
   759:				slotCost: type === "multiple" ? outputItemKeySet.size : getSingleGroupSlotCost(orders),
   760:				outputItemKeySet,
   761:				pieceCount,
   762:				location: buildLocationSummary(labelItems),
   763:			});
   764:
   765:		}
   766:	}
   767:
   768:	return groups;
   769:}
   770:
   771:
   772:/**
   773: * 按 group 的主导 zone、锚点 shelf 和件数，对 group 做稳定排序。
   774: *
   775: * @param {{ location: ReturnType<typeof buildLocationSummary>, upcUnique: string }} a 左侧 group。
   776: * @param {{ location: ReturnType<typeof buildLocationSummary>, upcUnique: string }} b 右侧 group。
   777: * @returns {number} 适用于排序的比较结果。
   778: */
   779:function compareGroupsByAnchor(a, b) {
   780:	if (a.location.dominantZone !== b.location.dominantZone) {
   781:		return compareZones(a.location.dominantZone, b.location.dominantZone);
   782:	}
   783:	if (a.location.anchorPosition.row !== b.location.anchorPosition.row) {
   784:		return a.location.anchorPosition.row - b.location.anchorPosition.row;
   785:	}
   786:	if (a.location.anchorPosition.column !== b.location.anchorPosition.column) {
   787:		return a.location.anchorPosition.column - b.location.anchorPosition.column;
   788:	}
   789:	if (a.location.anchorPosition.side !== b.location.anchorPosition.side) {
   790:		return a.location.anchorPosition.side - b.location.anchorPosition.side;
   791:	}
   792:	if (b.location.totalQty !== a.location.totalQty) {
   793:		return b.location.totalQty - a.location.totalQty;
   794:	}
   795:	return String(a.upcUnique).localeCompare(String(b.upcUnique));
   796:}
   797:
   798:/**
   799: * 按 group 在仓内路径上的起止位置做线性排序，适用于 `single` 的全局顺序规划。
   800: *
   801: * `single` 的目标更接近“沿仓库路径单向扫过去”，因此优先比较最早触达的货位，
   802: * 再比较该 group 的结束位置；同一路径段内再让件数更大的 group 靠前。
   803: *
   804: * @param {{ location: ReturnType<typeof buildLocationSummary>, pieceCount: number, upcUnique: string }} a 左侧 group。
   805: * @param {{ location: ReturnType<typeof buildLocationSummary>, pieceCount: number, upcUnique: string }} b 右侧 group。
   806: * @returns {number} 适用于 `single` 排序的比较结果。
   807: */
   808:function compareSingleGroupsByPath(a, b) {
   809:	if (a.location.minTravelIndex !== b.location.minTravelIndex) {
   810:		return a.location.minTravelIndex - b.location.minTravelIndex;
   811:	}
   812:	if (a.location.maxTravelIndex !== b.location.maxTravelIndex) {
   813:		return a.location.maxTravelIndex - b.location.maxTravelIndex;
   814:	}
   815:	if (a.location.anchorPosition.travelIndex !== b.location.anchorPosition.travelIndex) {
   816:		return a.location.anchorPosition.travelIndex - b.location.anchorPosition.travelIndex;
   817:	}
   818:	if (b.pieceCount !== a.pieceCount) {
   819:		return b.pieceCount - a.pieceCount;
   820:	}
   821:	return String(a.upcUnique).localeCompare(String(b.upcUnique));
   822:}
   823:
   824:function getGroupSortComparator(type) {
   825:	return type === "single" ? compareSingleGroupsByPath : compareGroupsByAnchor;
   826:}
   827:
   828:/**
   829: * 创建一个空的批次上下文，用于增量装填 group。
   830: *
   831: * @param {"single"|"multiple"} type 当前处理的数据类型。
   832: * @returns {{
   833: *   type: "single"|"multiple",
   834: *   groups: Array<Record<string, any>>,
   835: *   usedSlots: number,
   836: *   outputItemKeySet: Set<string>,
   837: *   zoneSet: Set<string>,
   838: *   shelfSet: Set<string>,
   839: *   prefixSet: Set<string>,
   840: *   avgTravelIndex: number,
   841: *   weightedQty: number
   842: * }} 新的批次上下文对象。
   843: */
   844:function createBatchContext(type) {
   845:	return {
   846:		type,
   847:		groups: [],
   848:		usedSlots: 0,
   849:		outputItemKeySet: new Set(),
   850:		zoneSet: new Set(),
   851:		shelfSet: new Set(),
   852:		prefixSet: new Set(),
   853:		avgTravelIndex: 0,
   854:		weightedQty: 0,
   855:	};
   856:}
   857:
   858:/**
   859: * 把一个集合中的全部值合并到另一个集合。
   860: *
   861: * @param {Set<string>} target 目标集合。
   862: * @param {Set<string>} source 来源集合。
   863: * @returns {void}
   864: */
   865:function mergeSet(target, source) {
   866:	for (const value of source) {
   867:		target.add(value);
   868:	}
   869:}
   870:
   871:/**
   872: * 计算候选 group 放入当前批次后的实际占用数。
   873: *
   874: * `multiple` 必须按最终聚合后的输出 key 去重统计；
   875: * `single` 则继续沿用已有的单组槽位成本。
   876: *
   877: * @param {ReturnType<typeof createBatchContext>} context 当前批次上下文。
   878: * @param {{ slotCost: number, outputItemKeySet: Set<string> }} candidate 候选 group。
   879: * @returns {number} 放入候选项后的实际占用数。
   880: */
   881:function calcCandidateNextUsedSlots(context, candidate) {
   882:	if (context.type !== "multiple") {
   883:		return context.usedSlots + candidate.slotCost;
   884:	}
   885:
   886:	let addedCount = 0;
   887:	for (const key of candidate.outputItemKeySet) {
   888:		if (!context.outputItemKeySet.has(key)) {
   889:			addedCount += 1;
   890:		}
   891:	}
   892:	return context.usedSlots + addedCount;
   893:}
   894:
   895:/**
   896: * 将一个 group 放入当前批次上下文，并同步更新统计特征。
   897: *
   898: * @param {ReturnType<typeof createBatchContext>} context 当前批次上下文。
   899: * @param {{ slotCost: number, outputItemKeySet: Set<string>, location: ReturnType<typeof buildLocationSummary> }} group 待加入的 group。
   900: * @returns {void}
   901: */
   902:function updateBatchContext(context, group) {
   903:	context.groups.push(group);
   904:	if (context.type === "multiple") {
   905:		mergeSet(context.outputItemKeySet, group.outputItemKeySet);
   906:		context.usedSlots = context.outputItemKeySet.size;
   907:	} else {
   908:		context.usedSlots += group.slotCost;
   909:	}
   910:	mergeSet(context.zoneSet, group.location.zoneSet);
   911:	mergeSet(context.shelfSet, group.location.shelfSet);
   912:	mergeSet(context.prefixSet, group.location.prefixSet);
   913:
   914:	const qty = Math.max(group.location.totalQty, 1);
   915:	context.avgTravelIndex =
   916:		(context.avgTravelIndex * context.weightedQty + group.location.avgTravelIndex * qty) /
   917:		(context.weightedQty + qty);
   918:	context.weightedQty += qty;
   919:}
   920:
   921:/**
   922: * 计算两个集合的交集大小。
   923: *
   924: * @param {Set<string>} left 左侧集合。
   925: * @param {Set<string>} right 右侧集合。
   926: * @returns {number} 两个集合中相同元素的数量。
   927: */
   928:function calcSetIntersectionSize(left, right) {
   929:	const smaller = left.size <= right.size ? left : right;
   930:	const larger = smaller === left ? right : left;
   931:	let count = 0;
   932:	for (const value of smaller) {
   933:		if (larger.has(value)) {
   934:			count += 1;
   935:		}
   936:	}
   937:	return count;
   938:}
   939:
   940:/**
   941: * 评估一个候选 group 放入当前批次后的适配程度。
   942: *
   943: * @param {{ slotCost: number, outputItemKeySet: Set<string>, location: ReturnType<typeof buildLocationSummary> }} candidate 候选 group。
   944: * @param {ReturnType<typeof createBatchContext>} context 当前批次上下文。
   945: * @param {number} boxSize 每批最大槽位数。
   946: * @returns {number} 评分越高越适合；若超出 `boxSize`，返回 `-Infinity`。
   947: */
   948:function scoreCandidate(candidate, context, boxSize) {
   949:	const nextUsedSlots = calcCandidateNextUsedSlots(context, candidate);
   950:	if (nextUsedSlots > boxSize) {
   951:		return -Infinity;
   952:	}
   953:
   954:	const addedSlots = nextUsedSlots - context.usedSlots;
   955:	if (context.groups.length === 0) {
   956:		return (
   957:			candidate.location.totalQty * 10 -
   958:			candidate.location.anchorPosition.travelIndex -
   959:			addedSlots
   960:		);
   961:	}
   962:
   963:	const sharedZones = calcSetIntersectionSize(candidate.location.zoneSet, context.zoneSet);
   964:	const sharedShelves = calcSetIntersectionSize(candidate.location.shelfSet, context.shelfSet);
   965:	const sharedPrefixes = calcSetIntersectionSize(candidate.location.prefixSet, context.prefixSet);
   966:	const distance = Math.abs(candidate.location.avgTravelIndex - context.avgTravelIndex);
   967:	const remains = boxSize - nextUsedSlots;
   968:
   969:	let score = 0;
   970:	score += sharedShelves * 4000;
   971:	score += sharedPrefixes * 1200;
   972:	score += sharedZones * 900;
   973:	if (context.shelfSet.has(candidate.location.dominantShelf)) {
   974:		score += 3000;
   975:	}
   976:	if (context.zoneSet.has(candidate.location.dominantZone)) {
   977:		score += 1800;
   978:	}
   979:	score += Math.max(0, 1200 - distance * 12);
   980:	score += Math.max(0, 600 - candidate.location.anchorPosition.row * 20);
   981:	score += Math.max(0, 150 - remains * 10);
   982:	score += Math.max(0, 300 - addedSlots * 20);
   983:	score += candidate.location.totalQty * 5;
   984:	return score;
   985:}
   986:
   987:
   988:/**
   989: * 输出前复制一份 `labelItem`，确保只保留最终 JSON 需要的字段。
   990: *
   991: * @param {{ zoneNo: string, zoneName: string, shelfNo: string, shelfName: string, upc: string, sku: string, orderNo: string, num: number }} item 原始 labelItem。
   992: * @returns {{ zoneNo: string, zoneName: string, shelfNo: string, shelfName: string, upc: string, sku: string, orderNo: string, num: number }} 可直接写入 JSON 的明细对象。
   993: */
   994:function toOutputLabelItem(item) {
   995:	return {
   996:		zoneNo: item.zoneNo,
   997:		zoneName: item.zoneName,
   998:		shelfNo: item.shelfNo,
   999:		shelfName: item.shelfName,
  1000:		upc: item.upc,
  1001:		sku: item.sku,
  1002:		orderNo: item.orderNo,
  1003:		num: item.num,
  1004:	};
  1005:}
  1006:
  1007:/**
  1008: * 在最终输出前按货位与 UPC 合并同类明细，避免同一拣货点重复多行。
  1009: *
  1010: * 仅对 `multiple` 批次启用：`single` 的 `labelDesc.items[].orderNo` 仍可按真实订单反查，
  1011: * 保持原样可以避免改变既有语义。
  1012: *
  1013: * @param {"single"|"multiple"} type 当前处理的数据类型。
  1014: * @param {Array<{ zoneNo: string, zoneName: string, shelfNo: string, shelfName: string, upc: string, sku: string, orderNo: string, num: number }>} items 当前 zone 下的明细列表。
  1015: * @returns {Array<{ zoneNo: string, zoneName: string, shelfNo: string, shelfName: string, upc: string, sku: string, orderNo: string, num: number }>}
  1016: * 可直接用于输出和统计的明细列表。
  1017: */
  1018:function aggregateOutputLabelItems(type, items) {
  1019:	if (type !== "multiple") {
  1020:		return [...items];
  1021:	}
  1022:
  1023:	const aggregatedMap = new Map();
  1024:
  1025:	for (const rawItem of items) {
  1026:		const item = normalizeLabelItem(rawItem, rawItem?.zoneName);
  1027:		const key = buildAggregatedOutputItemKey(item);
  1028:
  1029:
  1030:		if (!aggregatedMap.has(key)) {
  1031:			aggregatedMap.set(key, { ...item });
  1032:			continue;
  1033:		}
  1034:
  1035:		aggregatedMap.get(key).num += item.num;
  1036:	}
  1037:
  1038:	return [...aggregatedMap.values()];
  1039:}
  1040:
  1041:/**
  1042: * 将一批已选中的 groups 重建为最终输出批次，同时顺手统计切换次数。
  1043: *
  1044: * @param {"single"|"multiple"} type 当前处理的数据类型。
  1045: * @param {number} batchNo 新批次序号，从 `1` 开始。
  1046: * @param {Array<Record<string, any>>} groups 组成该批次的 group 列表。
  1047: * @returns {{
  1048: *   batch: { upcUniqueList: string[], orders: Array<Array<Record<string, any>>>, orderNoList: string[], pickNo: string, labelDesc: Array<{ zoneName: string, items: Array<Record<string, any>> }> },
  1049: *   metrics: { totalZoneSwitches: number, totalShelfSwitches: number, totalItems: number }
  1050: * }} 最终批次对象及其统计信息。
  1051: */
  1052:function buildBatchFromGroups(type, batchNo, groups) {
  1053:	const sortedGroups = [...groups].sort(getGroupSortComparator(type));
  1054:	const upcUniqueList = [];
  1055:	const orders = [];
  1056:	const orderNoSet = new Set();
  1057:	const zoneMap = new Map();
  1058:
  1059:	for (const group of sortedGroups) {
  1060:		upcUniqueList.push(group.upcUnique);
  1061:		orders.push(group.orders);
  1062:		for (const orderNo of group.orderNoList) {
  1063:			if (orderNo) {
  1064:				orderNoSet.add(orderNo);
  1065:			}
  1066:		}
  1067:		for (const item of group.labelItems) {
  1068:			const zoneName = item.zoneName || "UNKNOWN";
  1069:			if (!zoneMap.has(zoneName)) {
  1070:				zoneMap.set(zoneName, []);
  1071:			}
  1072:			zoneMap.get(zoneName).push(item);
  1073:		}
  1074:	}
  1075:
  1076:	const labelDesc = [];
  1077:	let totalZoneSwitches = 0;
  1078:	let totalShelfSwitches = 0;
  1079:	let totalItems = 0;
  1080:	let previousItem = null;
  1081:
  1082:	for (const [zoneName, rawItems] of [...zoneMap.entries()].sort(([zoneA], [zoneB]) => compareZones(zoneA, zoneB))) {
  1083:		const items = aggregateOutputLabelItems(type, rawItems).sort(compareLabelItems);
  1084:		totalItems += items.length;
  1085:
  1086:		for (const item of items) {
  1087:			if (previousItem) {
  1088:				if (item.zoneName !== previousItem.zoneName) {
  1089:					totalZoneSwitches += 1;
  1090:				}
  1091:				if (item.shelfName !== previousItem.shelfName) {
  1092:					totalShelfSwitches += 1;
  1093:				}
  1094:			}
  1095:			previousItem = item;
  1096:		}
  1097:
  1098:		labelDesc.push({
  1099:			zoneName,
  1100:			items: items.map(toOutputLabelItem),
  1101:		});
  1102:	}
  1103:
  1104:
  1105:	return {
  1106:		batch: {
  1107:			upcUniqueList,
  1108:			orders,
  1109:			orderNoList: [...orderNoSet],
  1110:			pickNo: `OPT-${type.toUpperCase().slice(0, 3)}-${String(batchNo).padStart(3, "0")}`,
  1111:			labelDesc,
  1112:		},
  1113:		metrics: {
  1114:			totalZoneSwitches,
  1115:			totalShelfSwitches,
  1116:			totalItems,
  1117:		},
  1118:	};
  1119:}
  1120:
  1121:
  1122:/**
  1123: * 对 `single` 批次执行“全局路径排序 + 连续分批”。
  1124: *
  1125: * `single` 的组之间没有 `multiple` 那种组合绑定约束，更适合先按仓内路径排成一条线，
  1126: * 再按容量顺序切批，避免种子选择把同一路径上的组打散。
  1127: *
  1128: * @param {Array<Record<string, any>>} batches 原始 `single` 批次数组。
  1129: * @param {number} boxSize 每个优化后批次允许的最大槽位数。
  1130: * @returns {{
  1131: *   groups: Array<Record<string, any>>,
  1132: *   optimizedBatches: Array<Record<string, any>>,
  1133: *   metrics: { totalZoneSwitches: number, totalShelfSwitches: number, totalItems: number }
  1134: * }} 原始 group 列表、优化后的批次列表及统计信息。
  1135: */
  1136:function optimizeSingleBatchesByPath(batches, boxSize) {
  1137:	const groups = buildGroups("single", batches).sort(compareSingleGroupsByPath);
  1138:	const optimizedBatches = [];
  1139:	const metrics = {
  1140:		totalZoneSwitches: 0,
  1141:		totalShelfSwitches: 0,
  1142:		totalItems: 0,
  1143:	};
  1144:	let currentGroups = [];
  1145:	let currentUsedSlots = 0;
  1146:
  1147:	const flushCurrentBatch = () => {
  1148:		if (currentGroups.length === 0) {
  1149:			return;
  1150:		}
  1151:		const { batch, metrics: batchMetrics } = buildBatchFromGroups(
  1152:			"single",
  1153:			optimizedBatches.length + 1,
  1154:			currentGroups,
  1155:		);
  1156:		optimizedBatches.push(batch);
  1157:		metrics.totalZoneSwitches += batchMetrics.totalZoneSwitches;
  1158:		metrics.totalShelfSwitches += batchMetrics.totalShelfSwitches;
  1159:		metrics.totalItems += batchMetrics.totalItems;
  1160:		currentGroups = [];
  1161:		currentUsedSlots = 0;
  1162:	};
  1163:
  1164:	for (const group of groups) {
  1165:		const nextUsedSlots = currentUsedSlots + group.slotCost;
  1166:		if (currentGroups.length > 0 && nextUsedSlots > boxSize) {
  1167:			flushCurrentBatch();
  1168:		}
  1169:		currentGroups.push(group);
  1170:		currentUsedSlots += group.slotCost;
  1171:	}
  1172:
  1173:	flushCurrentBatch();
  1174:
  1175:	return {
  1176:		groups,
  1177:		optimizedBatches,
  1178:		metrics,
  1179:	};
  1180:}
  1181:
  1182:/**
  1183: * 对某一类批次（`single` 或 `multiple`）执行重排优化。
  1184: *
  1185: * `single` 走全局路径排序；`multiple` 保留启发式聚类。
  1186: *
  1187: * @param {"single"|"multiple"} type 当前处理的数据类型。
  1188: * @param {Array<Record<string, any>>} batches 原始批次数组。
  1189: * @param {number} boxSize 每个优化后批次允许的最大槽位数。
  1190: * @returns {{
  1191: *   groups: Array<Record<string, any>>,
  1192: *   optimizedBatches: Array<Record<string, any>>,
  1193: *   metrics: { totalZoneSwitches: number, totalShelfSwitches: number, totalItems: number }
  1194: * }} 原始 group 列表、优化后的批次列表及统计信息。
  1195: */
  1196:function optimizeTypeBatches(type, batches, boxSize) {
  1197:	if (type === "single") {
  1198:		return optimizeSingleBatchesByPath(batches, boxSize);
  1199:	}
  1200:
  1201:	// `multiple` 先选一个种子 group，再不断挑选“最像当前批次”的候选项塞进来，
  1202:	// 直到达到 boxSize 上限。这里用的是启发式评分，不是全局最优求解。
  1203:	const groups = buildGroups(type, batches).sort(compareGroupsByAnchor);
  1204:	const remaining = new Set(groups.map((group) => group.id));
  1205:	const groupMap = new Map(groups.map((group) => [group.id, group]));
  1206:	const optimizedBatches = [];
  1207:	const metrics = {
  1208:		totalZoneSwitches: 0,
  1209:		totalShelfSwitches: 0,
  1210:		totalItems: 0,
  1211:	};
  1212:
  1213:	while (remaining.size > 0) {
  1214:		const context = createBatchContext(type);
  1215:
  1216:		const seed = groups.find((group) => remaining.has(group.id));
  1217:		if (!seed) break;
  1218:
  1219:		updateBatchContext(context, seed);
  1220:		remaining.delete(seed.id);
  1221:
  1222:		while (true) {
  1223:			let bestCandidate = null;
  1224:			let bestScore = -Infinity;
  1225:
  1226:			for (const groupId of remaining) {
  1227:				const candidate = groupMap.get(groupId);
  1228:				const score = scoreCandidate(candidate, context, boxSize);
  1229:				if (score > bestScore) {
  1230:					bestScore = score;
  1231:					bestCandidate = candidate;
  1232:				}
  1233:			}
  1234:
  1235:			if (!bestCandidate || bestScore === -Infinity) {
  1236:				break;
  1237:			}
  1238:
  1239:			updateBatchContext(context, bestCandidate);
  1240:			remaining.delete(bestCandidate.id);
  1241:		}
  1242:
  1243:		const { batch, metrics: batchMetrics } = buildBatchFromGroups(
  1244:			type,
  1245:			optimizedBatches.length + 1,
  1246:			context.groups,
  1247:		);
  1248:		optimizedBatches.push(batch);
  1249:		metrics.totalZoneSwitches += batchMetrics.totalZoneSwitches;
  1250:		metrics.totalShelfSwitches += batchMetrics.totalShelfSwitches;
  1251:		metrics.totalItems += batchMetrics.totalItems;
  1252:	}
  1253:
  1254:	return {
  1255:		groups,
  1256:		optimizedBatches,
  1257:		metrics,
  1258:	};
  1259:}
  1260:
  1261:/**
  1262: * 对完整订单 JSON 执行优化，并同时产出统计信息。
  1263: *
  1264: * @param {{ single?: Array<Record<string, any>>, multiple?: Array<Record<string, any>> }} data 原始订单 JSON。
  1265: * @param {number} [boxSize=DEFAULT_BOX_SIZE] 每批最大槽位数。
  1266: * @returns {{
  1267: *   optimizedData: { single: Array<Record<string, any>>, multiple: Array<Record<string, any>> },
  1268: *   stats: {
  1269: *     single: { originalBatchCount: number, optimizedBatchCount: number, groupCount: number, totalZoneSwitches: number, totalShelfSwitches: number, totalItems: number },
  1270: *     multiple: { originalBatchCount: number, optimizedBatchCount: number, groupCount: number, totalZoneSwitches: number, totalShelfSwitches: number, totalItems: number }
  1271: *   }
  1272: * }} 优化后的 JSON 和统计摘要。
  1273: */
  1274:function optimizePickingData(data, boxSize = DEFAULT_BOX_SIZE) {
  1275:	const singleResult = optimizeTypeBatches("single", data.single || [], boxSize);
  1276:	const multipleResult = optimizeTypeBatches("multiple", data.multiple || [], boxSize);
  1277:
  1278:	return {
  1279:		optimizedData: {
  1280:			single: singleResult.optimizedBatches,
  1281:			multiple: multipleResult.optimizedBatches,
  1282:		},
  1283:		stats: {
  1284:			single: {
  1285:				originalBatchCount: (data.single || []).length,
  1286:				optimizedBatchCount: singleResult.optimizedBatches.length,
  1287:				groupCount: singleResult.groups.length,
  1288:				...singleResult.metrics,
  1289:			},
  1290:			multiple: {
  1291:				originalBatchCount: (data.multiple || []).length,
  1292:				optimizedBatchCount: multipleResult.optimizedBatches.length,
  1293:				groupCount: multipleResult.groups.length,
  1294:				...multipleResult.metrics,
  1295:			},
  1296:		},
  1297:	};
  1298:}
  1299:
  1300:/**
  1301: * 将优化统计结果输出到控制台。
  1302: *
  1303: * @param {{ single: Record<string, number>, multiple: Record<string, number> }} stats `optimizePickingData` 返回的 `stats` 对象。
  1304: * @returns {void}
  1305: */
  1306:function printStats(stats) {
  1307:	for (const type of ["single", "multiple"]) {
  1308:		const item = stats[type];
  1309:		console.log(`\n[${type}]`);
  1310:		console.log(`- 原批次数: ${item.originalBatchCount}`);
  1311:		console.log(`- 优化后批次数: ${item.optimizedBatchCount}`);
  1312:		console.log(`- UPC组数: ${item.groupCount}`);
  1313:		console.log(`- zone切换次数(按优化后拣货顺序统计): ${item.totalZoneSwitches}`);
  1314:		console.log(`- shelf切换次数(按优化后拣货顺序统计): ${item.totalShelfSwitches}`);
  1315:		console.log(`- 拣货明细行数: ${item.totalItems}`);
  1316:	}
  1317:}
  1318:
  1319:/**
  1320: * CLI 入口：读取输入 JSON，执行优化，写出结果并打印统计。
  1321: *
  1322: * @returns {void}
  1323: */
  1324:function main() {
  1325:	const options = parseArgs(process.argv);
  1326:	if (!fs.existsSync(options.inputPath)) {
  1327:		console.error(`输入文件不存在: ${options.inputPath}`);
  1328:		process.exit(1);
  1329:	}
  1330:
  1331:	const data = readJson(options.inputPath);
  1332:	const { optimizedData, stats } = optimizePickingData(data, options.boxSize);
  1333:	writeJson(options.outputPath, optimizedData);
  1334:
  1335:	console.log(`优化完成: ${options.outputPath}`);
  1336:	console.log(`每批最大聚合后UPC数: ${options.boxSize}`);
  1337:
  1338:	printStats(stats);
  1339:	console.log("\n后续可直接把优化后的 JSON 再交给 process-ordersV4.js 生成 PDF。");
  1340:}
  1341:
  1342:
  1343:if (require.main === module) {
  1344:	main();
  1345:}
  1346:
  1347:module.exports = {
  1348:	optimizePickingData,
  1349:	parseShelfPosition,
  1350:	compareShelves,
  1351:	buildGroups,
  1352:	optimizeTypeBatches,
  1353:};
  1354:
  1355:

对，**如果你现在是在 `electron` 目录里跑源码模式的 `electron .`，那每次点“处理”都会读最新的 `process-ordersV4.js`，并且它里面也会再读最新的 `optimize-pick-batches.js`。**

依据是：

```182:208:electron/main.js
ipcMain.handle('process-orders', async (event, options) => {
  ...
  const scriptPath = path.join(__dirname, '..', 'process-ordersV4.js');
  ...
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const child = spawn('node', args, {
      cwd: path.join(__dirname, '..'),
      stdio: ['pipe', 'pipe', 'pipe']
    });
```

还有另一条入口也是同样的做法：

```309:327:electron/main.js
const scriptPath = path.join(__dirname, '..', 'process-ordersV4.js');
const { spawn } = require('child_process');

const args = [scriptPath, tempJsonPath, outputDir || ''];

return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
  const child = spawn('node', args, {
    cwd: path.join(__dirname, '..'),
    stdio: ['pipe', 'pipe', 'pipe']
  });
```

这说明它**不是把 `process-ordersV4.js` 常驻 `require` 在 Electron 主进程里**，而是**每次处理时新起一个 `node` 子进程去执行这个脚本**。  
所以：

- 你改完 `process-ordersV4.js`
- 不重启 Electron，直接再点一次处理

**下一次也会吃到最新代码。**

而 `process-ordersV4.js` 里又会加载 `optimize-pick-batches.js`：

```7:10:process-ordersV4.js
const {
	optimizePickingData,
	parseShelfPosition,
} = require("./optimize-pick-batches");
```

因为这是**新的子进程**，所以这个 `require` 也是重新加载的，不会被上一次处理缓存住。

---

### 结论分情况说

#### 1）你现在这种开发调试方式：`electron .`
是的，**每次处理都会读最新的这两个文件**。

#### 2）如果你改的是 `electron/main.js`、`renderer.js`、`preload.js`
这个就**通常需要重启 Electron**，因为这些是 Electron 进程自己启动时加载的，不是每次处理都重新起。

#### 3）如果你跑的是打包后的 `exe`
那就**不是读工作区里的最新源码**了，而是读打包时带进去的版本：

```24:43:electron/package.json
"files": [
    "main.js",
    "preload.js",
    "index.html",
    "styles.css",
    "renderer.js",
    "../process-ordersV4.js",
    "../optimize-pick-batches.js",
    ...
],
"extraResources": [
    {
        "from": "../process-ordersV4.js",
        "to": "process-ordersV4.js"
    },
    {
        "from": "../optimize-pick-batches.js",
        "to": "optimize-pick-batches.js"
    }
]
```

也就是说：

- `electron .`：读你本地当前最新源码
- `dist-electron` / 安装版：读打包时那一份

---

### 你可以直接这么理解
**现在你在开发模式下调试 `process-ordersV4.js` / `optimize-pick-batches.js`，不用每次重启 Electron；改完后重新点一次“处理”就行。**

如果你愿意，我还可以顺手帮你确认一下当前 Electron 界面里有没有别的地方把这两个脚本缓存住。

---

<previous_assistant_message>
我看清楚了，逻辑分成两层：

### 1）`cover -> 该 cover 下面的面单` 的排序逻辑在哪

最终合并顺序在 `mergePDFs` 里：

```403:428:process-ordersV4.js
for (const upc of upcUniqueList) {
	if (!upcPageRanges[upc]) continue;
	...
	if (fs.existsSync(coverPath)) {
		...
		mergedDoc.addPage(coverPage);
	}

	const upcPdfFiles = (upcInfo.orderedPdfFiles || []).filter((file) =>
		pdfFiles.includes(file),
	);

	for (const pdfFile of upcPdfFiles) {
		...
		mergedDoc.addPage(page);
	}
}
```

这里非常明确：  
- 先按 `upcUniqueList` / `processedUpcList` 的顺序
- 每个 `upc` 先加 `cover`
- 再加这个 `upc` 对应的所有面单 `orderedPdfFiles`

---

### 2）`cover` 自己的先后顺序是谁决定的

是优化阶段决定的，不是在合并 PDF 时临时排的。

```1009:1018:optimize-pick-batches.js
function buildBatchFromGroups(type, batchNo, groups) {
	const sortedGroups = [...groups].sort(compareGroupsByAnchor);
	const upcUniqueList = [];
	const orders = [];

	for (const group of sortedGroups) {
		upcUniqueList.push(group.upcUnique);
		orders.push(group.orders);
```

而 `compareGroupsByAnchor` 的规则是：

```766:782:optimize-pick-batches.js
function compareGroupsByAnchor(a, b) {
	if (a.location.dominantZone !== b.location.dominantZone) {
		return compareZones(a.location.dominantZone, b.location.dominantZone);
	}
	if (a.location.anchorPosition.row !== b.location.anchorPosition.row) {
		return a.location.anchorPosition.row - b.location.anchorPosition.row;
	}
	if (a.location.anchorPosition.column !== b.location.anchorPosition.column) {
		return a.location.anchorPosition.column - b.location.anchorPosition.column;
	}
	if (a.location.anchorPosition.side !== b.location.anchorPosition.side) {
		return a.location.anchorPosition.side - b.location.anchorPosition.side;
	}
	if (b.location.totalQty !== a.location.totalQty) {
		return b.location.totalQty - a.location.totalQty;
	}
	return String(a.upcUnique).localeCompare(String(b.upcUnique));
}
```

也就是说：  
- 先按 `zone`
- 再按货架位置 `row/column/side`
- 然后才按 `totalQty` 大的优先  
不是单纯“按组合里的 SKU 数量排序”。

---

### 3）组合面单时，代码现在是怎么做的

`multiple` 批次里，原来是把组合 SKU 直接拼成一个字符串：

```609:670:process-ordersV4.js
for (let upcIndex = 0; upcIndex < batchItem.upcUniqueList.length; upcIndex++) {
	const upcOrders = batchItem.orders[upcIndex] || [];

	if (upcOrders.length === 0) continue;

	const firstOrder = upcOrders[0];
	const combinedUpc = firstOrder.upcDescList.join("");

	...
	for (const order of upcOrders) {
		if (processedOrders.has(order.orderNo)) {
			continue;
		}
		actualUpcOrders.push(order);
		processedOrders.add(order.orderNo);
	}

	for (const [orderPosition, order] of actualUpcOrders.entries()) {
		...
		orderedPdfFiles.push(labelFileName);
	}
	...
	processedUpcList.push(combinedUpc);
	...
	generateCoverPage(firstOrder.upcDescList, actualUpcOrders.length, coverPath);
}
```

这里有几个关键点：

- `combinedUpc = firstOrder.upcDescList.join("")`
  - 这个拼接结果主要用于文件名前缀、`upcPageRanges` key、`processedUpcList`
- 这个组合下面的面单顺序，来自 `actualUpcOrders`
- `actualUpcOrders` 的顺序，基本就是 `batchItem.orders[upcIndex]` 原顺序
- 并且会用 `processedOrders` 按 `orderNo` 去重，重复订单后面的会被跳过

---

### 4）你说的 cover 换行问题，我已经改了

原来 cover 是直接这样画的：

```51:71:process-ordersV4.js
function formatCoverSkuText(upc) {
	if (Array.isArray(upc)) {
		const lines = upc
			.map((item) => String(item || "").trim())
			.filter(Boolean);
		return lines.length ? `SKU:\n${lines.join("\n")}` : "SKU:";
	}
	return `SKU: ${String(upc || "")}`;
}

function generateCoverPage(upc, pcsCount, outputPath) {
	...
	doc.fontSize(24).text(formatCoverSkuText(upc), 10, 50, {
		align: "center",
		width: 300,
	});
```

并且 `multiple` 现在不再把 cover 文本传成拼接后的 `combinedUpc`，而是直接传 `firstOrder.upcDescList`：

```665:670:process-ordersV4.js
const coverPath = path.join(
	batchFolder,
	`cover-${filePrefix}.pdf`,
);
generateCoverPage(firstOrder.upcDescList, actualUpcOrders.length, coverPath);
```

所以组合面单的 cover 现在会按你希望的方式变成：

- `SKU:`
- 第一条 SKU
- 第二条 SKU
- 第三条 SKU

也就是类似：

```text
SKU:
WST264-XN*1
Chuangtie-T&B-005*2
```

如果某一条单独太长，`pdfkit` 会在这一条内部继续自动换行，但不会再把两条 SKU 黏在一行里了。

---

### 5）结论

- `cover` 和下面面单的拼接顺序：在 `mergePDFs`
- `cover` 先后顺序：来自优化后的 `upcUniqueList`，本质由 `compareGroupsByAnchor` 决定
- 组合面单：原先 cover 文本是 `join("")` 拼起来，导致显示很差
- 我已经改成：组合 cover 按 `upcDescList` 一项一行显示

如果你愿意，我下一步可以继续帮你把组合 `cover` 的 SKU 改成“左对齐”而不是“居中”，拣货员看起来会更顺。
</previous_assistant_message>

```61:83:process-ordersV4.js
function buildMultipleOrderSignature(upcDescList) {
	const lines = normalizeCoverSkuLines(upcDescList);
	return lines.join("||");
}

function splitMultipleOrdersByExactSku(upcOrders) {
	const groupMap = new Map();

	for (const order of upcOrders || []) {
		const skuLines = normalizeCoverSkuLines(order?.upcDescList);
		const signature = buildMultipleOrderSignature(skuLines) || `__EMPTY__${order?.orderNo || ""}`;
		...
		groupMap.get(signature).orders.push(order);
	}

	return [...groupMap.values()];
}
```

所以现在“数量不同”的组合单不会共用同一个 `cover`。
